name: The Flood
description: The Great Flood in the days of Noah (Genesis 7:11)

name: Tower of Babel
description: Dispersion after the Tower of Babel (Genesis 11:9)

name: Covenant of the Parts
description: Brit Bein HaBetarim – God's covenant with Abraham (Genesis 15)

name: Binding of Isaac
description: The Akeidah – binding of Isaac on Mount Moriah (Genesis 22)

name: Giving of the Torah
description: The Torah was given at Mount Sinai (Exodus 19-20)

name: Golden Calf
description: The sin of the Golden Calf (Exodus 32)

name: Sin of the Spies
description: The spies returned with an evil report (Numbers 13-14)

name: Entering the Land
description: Israel crossed the Jordan into the Land (Joshua 3-4)

name: First Temple Period
description: Solomon's Temple completed (1 Kings 6:38) through destruction by Babylon (2 Kings 25)

name: Second Temple Period
description: Second Temple completed (Ezra 6:15) through destruction by Rome

name: Chanukah
description: Rededication of the Temple by the Maccabees
